actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 26-year-old woman has appeared in court charged with murdering her daughter.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: George Hamilton, Chief Constable of the PSNI, has told MPs that police checkpoints are not likely on the border with the Republic of Ireland after Brexit.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Spanish police have arrested former banker Miguel Angel Conde and six other people over alleged money laundering.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Christopher Williams, 25, from Wolverhampton, died in a motorbike crash on the A52 in Bottesford, Leicestershire.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Blackburn Rovers striker Nicklas Bendtner has left the club by mutual consent.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Amateur golfer Georgia Davies is tied for the lead at the Lalla Meryem Cup in Morocco.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Graham Borthwick, 50, has been jailed for 15 years after he was found guilty of sexually abusing two teenage boys.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Dutch coach Ronald Koeman has ruled out taking over as Netherlands coach.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 19-year-old man has been jailed for 21 months after pleading guilty to fraud by false representation.
